title: Extension scaffold loads in Chrome without errors
description: Verify the MV3 extension loads as unpacked in Chrome and registers its service worker

steps.action: Run tsc to compile TypeScript to dist/
Load the extension as unpacked in Chrome (chrome://extensions)
steps.expected: Extension appears with correct name, no errors in manifest parsing

steps.action: Check the service worker status in chrome://extensions
steps.expected: Service worker is registered and active
Field is present and set to '114'
